---
name: Bug report
about: Something doesn't work
labels: bug
---

**What happened?**
A clear description of the bug — what you did, what you expected, what you got.

**Your setup** (this usually decides the diagnosis — please fill in all of it)

- OS and version: <!-- e.g. macOS 15.5 / Ubuntu 24.04 / Fedora 40 -->
- Chip: <!-- Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3/…) / Intel / AMD -->
- Linux only — session type: <!-- X11 or Wayland (echo $XDG_SESSION_TYPE) -->
- Linux only — desktop: <!-- e.g. GNOME, KDE -->
- Python version: <!-- .venv/bin/python --version -->
- App you were dictating into: <!-- e.g. Slack, terminal, browser -->

**Terminal output**
Paste the output from the terminal where `./run.sh` is running (it almost
always helps). Remove anything you dictated that you'd rather keep private.

```
(paste here)
```

**Does it happen every time?**
Steps to reproduce, if you have them.
